Jason starts a run at 10.05 am and finishes at 1.02 pm.\\
Work out the time Jason takes to complete the run.
Calculate $\dfrac{1-0.7}{0.45-0.38}$, giving your answer correct to 4 significant figures.

Calculate the amount Kirsty receives.

tex:
Without using a calculator, work out $\dfrac{3}{7} - \dfrac{2}{21}$.\\
You must show all your working and give your answer as a fraction in its simplest form.

$v = 3 - 5t$

(a) Work out the value of $v$ when $t = 4$.

(b) Make $t$ the subject of the formula.

Kim has a 6-sided spinner numbered 1 to 6.\\
She spins it 63 times and her scores are shown in the table.

\begin{tabular}{|c|c|c|c|c|c|c|}
\hline
Score on spinner & 1 & 2 & 3 & 4 & 5 & 6 \\
\hline
Frequency & 12 & 7 & 15 & 11 & 8 & 10 \\
\hline
\end{tabular}
(a) Find the relative frequency of scoring a 5 with this spinner.

(b) Work out the mean score.

tex:
Factorise completely.\\
$14xy - 7y^2$

Lin invests \$16 000 at a rate of $r\%$ per year simple interest.\\
At the end of 5 years, she has a total amount of \$17 920.\\
Find the value of $r$.

$22, 17, 12, 7, 2, \ldots$

(a) Find the next term of the sequence.

(b) Find the $n$th term of the sequence.
Write down an irrational number with a value between 10 and 20.

The table shows the population and area of three countries in 2020.

\begin{tabular}{|l|c|c|}
\hline
Country & Population & Area (km$^2$) \\
\hline
Nigeria & $2.06 \times 10^8$ & $9.11 \times 10^5$ \\
Comoros & $8.70 \times 10^5$ & $1.86 \times 10^3$ \\
Vietnam & $9.73 \times 10^7$ & $3.10 \times 10^5$ \\
\hline
\end{tabular}
(a) Calculate the difference in population between Nigeria and Vietnam.

(b) Which of Comoros or Vietnam has the greater population density?\\
You must show all your working.

\[
\text{Population density} = \frac{\text{population}}{\text{area (km$^2$)}}
\]
